title: CTOV - Jellyfishing compat
description: Compatibility datapack between CTOV and JellyFish mod
body:
Add this datapack to the game to add compatibility between CTOV and Jellyfishing compat. You will find Krusty krab in villages. 1.19+ datapack is for Forge.

**Jellyfishing mod**

Jellyfishing mod can be obtained [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/jellyfishing)

**CTOV mod**

CTOV mod can be obtained from [here](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village)
